name: AfdxSetTokenInt64
title: AfdxSetTokenInt64
syntax: long AfdxSetTokenInt64( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], int64 value ); // form 1
description: This function sets the specified token‘s data to a new 64-bit integer value. With additional parameters (form 2) the user may specify the starting byte, length and byte ordering of the integer value in the token.
Note: The network byte order interpretation for form 1 is big-endian.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: handle of the message that has been created with AfdxInitPacket
